x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Metric rules define the thresholds that trigger DEX AI proactive investigation workflows. Without configured rules, DEX AI only reacts to manually created incidents, eliminating the proactive value proposition of DEX AI.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Convert HTML tables to structured prose or bulleted lists. Add descriptive alt text to all images. Now Assist AI summarization flattens HTML tables and ignores images without alt text — plain text content produces significantly better AI summaries.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c06
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Metric rules define the thresholds that trigger DEX AI proactive investigation workflows. Without configured rules, DEX AI only reacts to manually created incidents, eliminating the proactive value proposition of DEX AI.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>KB Article AI Content Suitability</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTables = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaTables.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaTables.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTables.addQuery('text', 'CONTAINS', '<table');
    gaTables.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTables.query();
    var tables = gaTables.next() ? parseInt(gaTables.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaImgs = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaImgs.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaImgs.addQuery('active', true);
    gaImgs.addQuery('text', 'CONTAINS', '<img');
    gaImgs.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaImgs.query();
    var imgs = gaImgs.next() ? parseInt(gaImgs.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var total = tables + imgs;
    var actualValue = 'Articles with HTML tables: ' + tables + ' | Articles with images: ' + imgs + ' | Total AI suitability issues: ' + total;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No AI suitability issues found. KB articles are structured for clean Now Assist AI summarization without HTML tables or images.'
        };
    } else if (total < 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' articles have AI suitability issues (HTML tables: ' + tables + ', images: ' + imgs + '). Now Assist flattens HTML tables and ignores images — convert to prose for better AI summarization quality.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' articles have AI suitability issues. High volume of table-heavy and image-dependent KB content will significantly degrade Now Assist AI summarization quality across the knowledge base.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005948</number>
<order>90</order>
<remediation_guidance>Convert HTML tables to structured prose or bulleted lists. Add descriptive alt text to all images. Now Assist AI summarization flattens HTML tables and ignores images without alt text — plain text content produces significantly better AI summaries.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c06</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
